info.title: LicitScope API
info.description: Explainable procurement intelligence for Brazilian public procurement data. This API serves normalized PNCP notices and contracts enriched with rule-based signals (summary, keywords, complexity / effort / risk, price anomaly) plus a hashed TF-IDF semantic search surface.
